raw_response:
```json
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement encourages self-reflection and openness to diverse perspectives in situations where one might have a rigid, dualistic mindset.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The cognitive frames of all-or-nothing thinking are common and identifiable.",
    "There is value in seeking truth even in opposing viewpoints.",
    "Dualistic perspectives can limit understanding."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is coherent as it aligns the concept of willingness to seek partial truths with overcoming rigid thought patterns.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "This statement would be useful if an individual recognizes the limitations of binary thinking and values the pursuit of broader understanding. It also requires an environment where diverse perspectives are accessible.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement may be misleading if taken as a suggestion that all perspectives have equal truth, when in reality some may be more valid or evidence-based than others."
}
```

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement encourages self-reflection and openness to diverse perspectives in situations where one might have a rigid, dualistic mindset.
implicit_claims: The cognitive frames of all-or-nothing thinking are common and identifiable.
There is value in seeking truth even in opposing viewpoints.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is coherent as it aligns the concept of willingness to seek partial truths with overcoming rigid thought patterns.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: This statement would be useful if an individual recognizes the limitations of binary thinking and values the pursuit of broader understanding. It also requires an environment where diverse perspectives are accessible.
